claimText: Under the forest clearance procedure, the Chief Conservator approves projects up to 5 hectares, whereas the MoEFCC grants clearance for projects above 5 hectares or any mining proposals.
evidenceExcerpt: Approval Authority varies: up to 5 ha by Chief Conservator, above 5 ha or mining by MoEFCC.
examUse: Statement-based question on forest clearance authorities.
distractorHooks: State Governments approve all mining projects in forest areas.
MoEFCC approves all forest clearance projects regardless of size.

claimText: The Forest (Conservation) Amendment Act, 2023 exempts forest land situated within 100 km of international borders or the Line of Actual Control (LAC) for national security projects.
evidenceExcerpt: 2023 Act exempts forest land within 100 kms of international borders or LAC for national security projects.
examUse: Statement-based question on exemptions under the Forest (Conservation) Amendment Act, 2023.
distractorHooks: Exempts land within 200 km of international borders.
Exempts land within 100 km of state borders.
Exempts land for commercial tourism projects near borders.

claimText: The Forest (Conservation) Amendment Act, 2023 provides an exemption of up to 5 hectares of forest land for defence or public utility projects in Left-Wing Extremism (LWE) affected areas.
evidenceExcerpt: Exempts up to 5 hectares for defence or public utility projects in Left-Wing Extremism-affected areas.
examUse: Statement-based question on specific regional exemptions in the 2023 Amendment.
distractorHooks: Exempts up to 10 hectares in LWE areas.
Exempts up to 5 hectares for private mining in LWE areas.

claimText: The 1996 Godavarman judgment by the Supreme Court expanded the definition of 'forest' to encompass its dictionary meaning and all government records, regardless of ownership.
evidenceExcerpt: Godavarman case (1996) expanded forest definition to include dictionary meaning and all government records irrespective of ownership.
examUse: Correct-pair or statement-based question on landmark environmental judgments.
distractorHooks: The Godavarman case restricted the definition of forests to only notified areas.
The Godavarman case applies only to state-owned forests.

claimText: The Forest (Conservation) Amendment Act, 2023 defines a forest as land notified under laws like the Indian Forest Act 1927 or recorded in government records on or after October 25, 1980.
evidenceExcerpt: The Forest (Conservation) Amendment Act, 2023 defines forest as land notified under laws like Indian Forest Act 1927 or recorded in govt records on/after Oct 25, 1980.
examUse: Statement-based question on the applicability criteria of the 2023 Amendment.
distractorHooks: Recorded in government records on or after January 1, 1996.
Applies only to land notified under the Wildlife Protection Act.
